summary: Wire pytest coverage defaults + guard so TEOF enforces ≥70% line-rate (memory/log: coverage gap).

steps.title: Add pytest coverage config
steps.notes: Update pyproject to define pytest addopts/testpaths and include pytest-cov dependency or doc; ensure coverage.xml emitted.

steps.title: Implement coverage guard + hook
steps.notes: Create tools.tests.coverage_guard (parse coverage.xml, enforce threshold) and call it from tools/agent/runner.sh (and document CLI).

steps.title: Document + receipts
steps.notes: Explain in docs/agents.md (or automation doc) and capture plan/tests receipts.

checkpoint.description: Coverage config + guard landed, docs/tests updated
